cooperates.cooperate_desc: Atlas is the best tank partner for Zetian because his ultimate groups multiple enemies in one place, creating the perfect setup for her full combo. Once Atlas lands a strong engage, Zetian can instantly follow with her ultimate and AoE burst, often winning the teamfight immediately. This combo is one of the strongest wombo setups in the game.

igreal works perfectly with Zetian thanks to his reliable crowd control and strong initiation. His ability to pull and stun several enemies gives Zetian enough time to place her second skill and chain her burst damage safely from the backline. He is especially strong in objective fights around Turtle and Lord.

Khufra is another excellent synergy pick because he can lock down mobile assassins and stop dashes, which protects Zetian from her biggest threats. His engage also helps keep enemies inside her damage zone longer, allowing better poke and easier follow-up.

counters.counter_desc: Nolan is dangerous because of his fast burst combo and easy access to the backline. He can punish poor positioning and quickly reset after securing a kill, which makes him a strong answer to Zetian in solo queue and coordinated play.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, Zetian should focus on clearing the mid wave quickly and poking the enemy mage with her first and second skills. Her strong range allows her to safely pressure the lane while checking bushes and helping side lanes with vision. Avoid overextending because mobile assassins can punish her weak positioning before level 4.

During the mid game, Zetian becomes much stronger in skirmishes and objective fights. Her ultimate provides excellent map vision and crowd control, making it easier for the team to secure Turtle, Lord, and key picks. Stay behind the frontline, use your combo after the tank engages, and focus on controlling enemy movement in teamfights.

In the late game, Zetian turns into a high-impact control mage with massive burst damage. With full items, her poke can heavily weaken enemies before fights even begin. Proper positioning is the key to success—stay protected by teammates, use ultimate for vision and initiation, and punish grouped enemies with your full combo.

emblems.emblem_desc: The best emblem setup is usually Mage Emblem, focused on magic penetration, cooldown reduction, and extra burn damage for stronger poke in lane.

equips.equip_desc:
his build is highly effective for Zetian because it balances cooldown reduction, burst damage, and late-game scaling.
Magic Shoes provide early cooldown reduction, allowing her to spam skills more often in lane and control the wave safely.
Glowing Wand adds strong poke damage and works well against enemies with higher HP, making her harassment much stronger in early and mid game.
Lightning Truncheon greatly increases her burst potential, especially when combined with her skill combos in teamfights.
Holy Crystal boosts her magic power significantly, making all of her abilities scale much harder into the late game.
The additional magic items further improve sustained damage, vision control, and finishing power, while Blood Wings gives huge magic power together with extra survivability through bonus HP.

Overall, this build makes Zetian excellent at long-range poke, teamfight burst, and strong late-game carry potential, which perfectly matches her playstyle as a control mage.

spell.spell_desc: For battle spells, I personally prefer Flicker because it gives extra safety and allows better repositioning in fights. Against heavy crowd control compositions, Purify is also a strong choice.

When returning to your lane, use your second skill to check bushes.

You can now use your ultimate for initiating a gank or clash. Also, use this for vision when securing an objective. When there is a team fight, position yourself at the back and use your first and second skill to poke enemies.

equips.equip_desc: For this build, buy boots for the CD. Then before buying glowing wand buy magic totem for mana and proceed to glowing wand. Then, Blood Wings for shield if passive is gone and extra magic damage and movement speed if the shield is gone. Then proceed to the next. Divine Glaive for penetration and Winter Crown for survivability.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zetian works best with heroes like Tigreal or Atlas who can group enemies together. When they use their crowd control, Zetian can easily land all her fire waves and her Ultimate to deal massive area damage to the entire enemy team.

counters.counter_desc: Zetian struggles against high-mobility assassins like Gusion or Lancelot who can dodge her slow-moving fire waves. She is also weak against heroes with "suppress" skills, like Franco or Kaja, who can catch her before she can use Flicker to escape.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Laning Phase
Focus on hitting minions and the enemy hero at once to clear waves quickly. Stay near your tower and use your Ultimate to support teammates in other lanes.

Team Fight Strategy
Keep your distance by staying behind your Tank while poking enemies with skills. Use your Ultimate during fights to stun the entire enemy team and reveal their positions.

emblems.emblem_desc: This Custom Mage Emblem is the best choice because it provides extra magic penetration and power for her fire waves. Using Bargain Hunter helps Zetian buy her expensive items much faster than the enemy. Impure Rage is also used to give her extra poke damage and keep her mana levels high during lane.

equips.equip_desc: This item build focuses on high Cooldown Reduction and Mana, allowing Zetian to spam her skills without stopping. Items like Enchanted Talisman and Magic Shoes ensure her Global Ultimate is ready for every team fight. The late-game items like Holy Crystal and Blood Wings give her the massive magic power needed to deal heavy damage.

hero.hero_overview: Zetian is a powerful Mage who controls the battlefield from the Mid Lane. She uses her fire phoenix skills to damage enemies from a safe distance. She is best at giving her team vision and helping in fights anywhere on the map.
hero.hero_strength:
Hero Strengths
Global Ultimate: Her special move hits every enemy on the map at once, showing where they are and stunning them.

Hard to Kill: She has a passive shield that automatically pushes away and stuns any enemy that gets too close to her.

Easy Movement: She can move around freely while casting her main fire waves, making it easy to hit enemies while staying safe.
hero.hero_weakness:
Hero Weaknesses
Low Burst: She deals damage over time rather than all at once, so she cannot "one-shot" enemies quickly.

High Mana Use: Her skills use a lot of mana, so she can run out of energy fast if she isn't careful in the early game.

Long Cooldowns: Her Ultimate takes a long time to recharge, so if you miss or use it at the wrong time, you lose your biggest advantage.

data.recommend: Zetian is a powerful Mid Lane Mage who uses fire phoenix skills to control the battlefield. She excels at providing team vision and supporting fights anywhere on the map with her global presence.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best choice because Zetian has no dash skills to escape through walls or away from fast enemies. It helps her stay alive longer so she can keep using her Global Ultimate to help the team. This spell is her only way to quickly move to a safe spot during a big fight.

equips.equip_title: High cooldown reduction (CDR), magic damage , and poke/zoning

hero.hero_overview: Zetian is a newly released, high-tier Mage in MLBB (featured in mid-2025) known for her exceptional long-range damage, map control, and CC-heavy ultimate, making her a potential ban-or-pick priority. She excels in laning and team fights with spammable skills but requires protection due to a lack of dash/escape abilities.
hero.hero_strength: Zetian, nicknamedCelestial Empress , released in mid-2025 (Season 37), is a Mage hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) who focuses on area control ( zoning ) and long-range attacks ( poke ). Her main strength lies in her ability todisrupts enemies from a safe distance while providing a global buff to the team.
hero.hero_weakness: Zetian in MLBB is a powerful mage with high burst and map control, but her primary weaknesses are a lack of dash/escape skills, a very long cooldown on her protective passive (120s), and vulnerability to high-mobility assassins and burst damage. She is easily countered by heroes that can dodge her skill shots or initiate with immunity.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Zetian works best in team compositions that can protect her positioning and capitalize on her crowd control. She is highly compatible with tank and fighter heroes who can initiate fights and absorb damage, allowing her to freely cast skills from the backline. Heroes with strong initiation and lockdown abilities pair well with Zetian, as they keep enemies within her skill range, maximizing her area damage and control.

She also synergizes effectively with marksmen and burst assassins who can quickly eliminate enemies once Zetian weakens or controls them. Her zoning abilities create safe spaces for allies to deal damage and secure objectives. In coordinated teams, Zetian becomes a strong centerpiece during mid-game team fights, where proper synergy allows her to dominate clashes and dictate engagements.

Overall, Zetian fits best in team-oriented lineups that focus on grouped fights, objective control, and structured engagements rather than split-pushing strategies.

counters.counter_desc:
Despite her strengths, Zetian has clear weaknesses that certain heroes can exploit. She is heavily countered by high-mobility assassins who can quickly close the gap and burst her down before she can respond. Heroes that specialize in diving the backline pose a serious threat, especially if Zetian lacks proper vision or protection from her team.

Additionally, heroes with silence, suppression, or instant burst damage can interrupt her skill usage and eliminate her before she contributes to fights. Strong early-game pressure can also limit her impact, as Zetian needs time and items to reach her peak performance. When forced into isolated situations or caught without cooldowns, she becomes highly vulnerable.

To reduce these weaknesses, Zetian players must rely on good positioning, map awareness, and teamwork. Staying close to allies, avoiding overextension, and timing engagements carefully are crucial to surviving against her counters.

dominants.dominant_desc:
To play Zetian effectively, positioning and map awareness are essential. As a mage with low mobility, she should always stay behind tanks and fighters during team fights, using her range to deal damage while avoiding direct engagements. Zetian players should focus on clearing mid-lane waves quickly, then rotating to side lanes to assist teammates and apply pressure across the map. Managing mana and cooldowns is also important, as her effectiveness depends on consistent skill usage.

During team fights, Zetian should prioritize hitting multiple enemies with her crowd control abilities to disrupt formations and create openings for her team. Avoid overextending or wandering alone, as assassins can easily eliminate her if she is caught out of position. With good timing, proper positioning, and smart rotations, Zetian can control the battlefield and become a decisive force in securing victories for her team.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Keeps Zetian’s Mana sustainable in lane and increases her poke damage during the early and mid game. Dealing skill damage burns enemy Mana (or Energy) and restores Mana for Zetian while dealing extra magic damage. This emblem set makes Zetian stronger in lane control, poking, and team fight pressure, which perfectly matches her mage playstyle.

Improves damage output through Magic Penetration
Solves mana issues, allowing frequent skill usage
Adds mobility, helping her stay safe in team fights

Dealing damage with skills three times within a short duration triggers an extra magic explosion based on the enemy’s Max HP. Perfect for burst combos—Zetian can quickly trigger this with her skills, dealing massive damage in a short time.

hero.hero_overview: Zetian is a powerful mage hero who specializes in crowd control and sustained magic damage. She excels at controlling team fights with her wide-area skills, disrupting enemy formations, and providing constant pressure from a safe distance. Zetian is best played as a mid-lane mage, where she can farm efficiently and support her team with her strong zoning and control abilities. Proper positioning and timing are key to maximizing her impact in battles.
hero.hero_strength:
Strong crowd control that can disrupt multiple enemies at once
High magic damage, especially in team fights
Excellent zone control, making it hard for enemies to engage
Scales well into the mid to late game
Very effective in objective fights (Turtle/Lord, team clashes)
hero.hero_weakness:
Low mobility, making her vulnerable to assassins
Squishy and can be easily burst down if mispositioned
Requires good positioning and map awareness
Cooldown-dependent; less effective when skills are unavailable
Weak when caught alone or during early-game pressure

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker allows the hero to blink a short distance in a chosen direction, instantly repositioning on the battlefield. After using Flicker, the hero also gains a temporary Physical and Magic Defense bonus for a short duration.

This spell is commonly used to escape dangerous situations, chase fleeing enemies, or initiate fights by quickly closing the gap. Flicker is especially useful for heroes with low mobility, helping them survive ganks and improve positioning during team fights.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zetian works perfectly with "clump" initiators. When Tigreal pulls multiple enemies together with his Ultimate, Zetian can follow up with her Skill 2 + Skill 1 combo to melt the entire group's Magic Defense and keep them stun-locked for the team to finish.

counters.counter_desc: Martis is a major threat to Zetian because his Skill 2 grants him Control Immunity. He can dash through Zetian Phoenix waves and ignore her passive knockback, allowing him to close the gap and burst her down before she can escape.

dominants.dominant_desc: Use Skill 1 to clear minion waves quickly and rotate immediately. Once you hit level 4, constantly watch the mini-map to use your Ultimate; you can win side-lane fights without being there just by providing that global stun and vision.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Inspire. Boosts your Cooldown Reduction  even further.
Bargain Hunter helps you get your core items faster since she needs a full build to be effective.
Impure Rage. Provides extra poke damage and restores Mana upon hitting skill vital for Zetian high mana usage.

equips.equip_desc: Zetian is a "Utility/Burn" mage rather than a "Burst" mage. Use these items to maximize her continuous damage.

hero.hero_overview: Zetian is a high-utility Control Mage with unique global presence. She is the Empress of Shendu and functions as a long-range poker and teamfight initiator. Her Ultimate is her signature move—it reveals all enemies on the map, damages them, and stuns them simultaneously, no matter where they are. Her passive grants her Spell Vamp when hitting skills, making her surprisingly durable for a mage.
hero.hero_strength: Her Ultimate (Fury of the Phoenix) is one of the best initiation and anti-ambush tools in the game. It provides vision, a stun, and a movement speed boost for allies. Skill 1 (Phoenix Strike) can be cast up to three times if it hits a target, allowing her to clear waves quickly and harass from a safe distance. Her Celestial Robe automatically knocks back and stuns enemies who get too close (on a cooldown), which is a huge counter to melee assassins like Saber or Helcurt. Her Skill 2 (Phoenix Descent) reduces enemy Magic Defense, making her excellent at melting tanks during teamfights.
hero.hero_weakness: She is a "chip damage" hero. She needs to hit her full 3-hit combo on Skill 1 to deal significant damage, unlike burst mages like Kadita. Because her Global Stun is so powerful, the cooldown is very long. Using it at the wrong time leaves your team without vision or CC for a large window. Frequent use of Skill 1 and Skill 2 to maintain her Spell Vamp stacks will drain her mana quickly in the early game. While casting her Phoenix Waves, she can move, but she is still susceptible to being caught out if she overextends to land the third (strongest) wave.

data.recommend: Zetian is a powerful control mage with unmatched global utility. Use this build to maximize your Cooldown Reduction and burn damage, allowing you to dominate the map and support your team.

spell.spell_desc: Essential for safety. Since Zetian lacks a natural dash, Flicker helps her escape assassins or reposition to land the third "pull" effect of her Skill 1

cooperates.cooperate_desc: The double-vision ultimate is super strong, definitely her best synergiser. Yi-Sun-Shin can use Ultimate to provide vision and Zetian can use it as a follow-up to hopefully pick-off an enemy or even more. In the late game, they can also constantly cycle Ultimates for vision, helping your team avoid ganks from enemies.

Gatotkaca Skill 2 Taunt can allow for you to easily kill enemies by fully hitting all 3 shots of your Skill 1. He is also able to effective protect you by taunting away enemies close to you and clearing up the map. They also have strong teamfight capabilities as they can easily follow up each others Ultimate.

Zetian Ultimate can provide stuns to proc Arlotts passive, especially in the early game without movement speed items yet due to it being difficult to dodge Zetians Ultimate. This can cause for some unexpected outplays in all stages of the game.

Zetian can use Ultimate to stun enemies and Grock can block their path of escape unless they have a dash skill that they have not already used to escape Zetians Ultimate. Paired with Grocks Ultimate and Flicker, it can cause some deadly and unexpected combos with little counterplay for the enemies.

Zetians Ultimate provides CC and blocks off some paths of escapes for enemies, as well as a movement speed buff, allowing for Claude to run through and quickly gun down enemies using his own Ultimate. Paired with Sprint on Claude, this is means for a deadly and unexpected wipeout.

counters.counter_desc: Zetian can constantly poke Bruno down from far away using minions, allowing for a easy kill potential overtime.
Yves Ultimate makes her unable to dodge Zetians Skill 1 and Ultimate, making her a easy and vulnerable target for Zetian and her teammates.
For the same reason as Bruno.

Her passive can make it difficult for Aamon to finish the job while her Skill 1, 2 and Ultimate can all reveal him easily. However, her passive has a long cooldown and Aamon can kill her quickly during this downtime.
Lesleys Ultimate makes her unable to move, thus becoming an easy target for Zetians Ultimate. Can easily kill her with assistance of her team.
Guinevere is unable to jump onto Zetian when Zetians passive is up, this can save Zetians entire team from a deadly Skill 2 flicker combo from Guinevere, completely negating it.
This is a skill-based matchup, while Zetian can cancel Pharsas Ultimate with her own, Pharsas Ultimate has a significantly lower Cooldown and can easily burst down Zetian.

Able to outrange Valentina and can deny her the chance to copy Ultimate, and even if she is able to copy it, it will have a longer Cooldown than Zetians. Depends on the player to use the Ultimate more effectively for their team
Possible to outplay but can dies quickly to Nolan.
Zetians Passive gives her a chance of survival but the long cooldown will be her downfall. Furthermore, Joy with temporal reign can dash onto Zetian again to finish the job.
Zetians Passive can stop Hayabusa from jumping onto her a few times, but during the downtime, she is a easy target for Hayabusa.
It is super difficult to do anything against a Lapu-Lapu as he has many CC immunes and dashes.
Extremely difficult to deal with and is likely her biggest counter. The only way to outplay Fanny is with help from teammates
Can stop Ixia from deleting your team during her Ultimate by using your own Ultimate. It is a very effective way to stop Ixia.
Same reason as Fanny.
Zetians passive makes it impossible for Khufra to set her and her team if shes nearby. She can also turn the tide of the teamfight with her Ultimate.
Too much mobility to deal with, hard to hit skills and Ultimate.
Same reason as Irithel.
Passive makes it difficult for Ling to engage on Zetian and she can use it to stop Ling from getting his 4 swords. Her ultimate can also be used to zone Ling from his 4 swords.
Impossible to run away from once he sees you even if you blow your flicker.
He can survive anything you throw at him and can damage you outside your passive range. Hard to deal with him and you are completely reliant on your team.

dominants.dominant_desc: Zetian is super dominant in early game due to her Skill 1 Extended range, use it to your full advantage and try to hit it all 3 times on the opposing mid-laner and minions while theyre trying to clear waves, then gank your gold laner to assist them in their lane domination, resulting in a smoother mid to late game.

Zetian falls off in the mid-game after minute 6 due to her long Cooldowns, try to play safe during this period and farm to scale and get more CDR (Cooldown Reduction) items. Use Ultimate to assist side lanes or teamfights from a far and get gold from assists.

Zetian late-game is quite strong, only lacking in wave clear against cannon minions, requiring 3-4 full Skill 1 or more just to clear 1. However, due to her cross-map Ultimate, and with so many CDR items to give it a low Cooldown, she can use it quite frequently. Use Ultimate to give your team an edge in team and lord fights, either as engage or disengage or even just a follow up. This gives your team an easier time securing crucial kills and objectives. If needed, you can also be the one clearing lanes in base and just use the Ultimate from base to assist your teammate, keeping an eye on the map to ensure good Ultimate timing and that you do not die to a surprise visit from an enemy trying to backdoor and that you are still efficiently defending minions.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Inspire is needed for the mana regeneration and lower cooldown in early game.

Wilderness Blessing so you are not a sitting duck in mid-lane and can gank side-lanes outside of your Ultimate. Can rotate faster in early game to make a gold lead for your team as well due to her fast wave clear.

Impure Rage for extra unexpected damage and to help her poke in early game. Can result in unexpected kills. It is also vital to ensure you do not run out of mana in the early game as anti-heal is a very important first item for her before enchanted talisman.
Rupture for more damage against the tanks. A little penetration goes a long way in helping you secure those kills.
Brave Smite helps you to stay in fights longer, use this if enemies have high burst damage and can hunt you easily. Impure Rage is still better though in my opinion.

equips.equip_desc: Anti-heal is very important for your team and as the mid-laner, you are the main source of anti-heal provider in the early stages of the game. Thus, rush glowing wand over enchanted talisman and use magic boots to ensure faster cooldowns for wave clear in early game.
Not much of a change except that Rapid Boots is used instead for more mobility against the CC heavy or slow heavy tanks, and Wishing Lantern for more Cooldown and melt against the tanks.

Only use this build if enemy team has many assassins and is constantly targetting you and making you drag your team down. This puts counter measures in place to help you survive till the late game. Sell boots for Divine Glaive or you will be barely scratching both enemies and minions in the late game.

hero.hero_overview: Zetian early game is super strong, try to use minions to poke out the enemy mid laner and try to get a solo kill at lv2. Her ultimate is unique offering CC anywhere on the map. Map awareness is key to playing her properly; always watch side-lanes (especially Gold Lane) to see if they need your Ultimate to Escape/Chase/Finish enemies. Her Ultimate is also great at initiating a teamfight for your team, or as a follow up for unexpected CC and Damage. The movement speed on her ultimate is strong and can help you or an ally run from enemies or chase so do not hesitate to use it if you see an opportunity.
hero.hero_strength:
Her laning is strong in the early game up till 5-6 minute mark, try to create a level and gold gap between you and the enemy mid laner.
Use Ultimate to assist side lanes if needed while not being there.
Her Ultimate can be a game changer in initiating teamfights, assisting in teamfights, cross-map support, turtle/lord fights, or even just helping you or your teammate chase or escape from enemies due to its movement speed buff and blocking certain routes off for enemies. It is also a guaranteed hit in early game as long as enemies do not have a dash skill or rapid boots, or anything that buffs movement speed.
hero.hero_weakness:
Zetian is very weak to getting ganked due to her passive having a long Cooldown, so play safe to ensure you are not feeding. Remember, your Ultimate has infinite range and can provide assistance even from base-to-base.

Even though her Ultimate provides vision, you almost never want to use it just for that as its a major part of her kit and has a long Cooldown. Save it to make plays instead.

data.recommend: Recommended for anyone looking to pick up Zetian or is struggling to use her effectively.

spell.spell_desc: She relies heavily on flicker to escape from enemies especially those with dashes or high mobility. You can also use it to redirect her Skill 1 if timed right so its the only spell that makes sense for her.

hero.hero_overview: Wu Zetian (Kagura) is a high-burst, high-skill mage hero who relies on her umbrella's second skill for damage, control, and burst. Her strength comes primarily from her skill combos and positioning details.
hero.hero_strength:
Cost: 1st skill drops parachute  wait for deceleration 2nd skill retracts parachute for movement + passive shield.

Burst: 1st skill drops parachute  2nd skill teleports to the parachute  ultimate to initiate a fight  1st skill retracts parachute for damage.

Self-preservation: 2nd skill retracts parachute to create distance + passive shield  1st skill drops parachute to slow pursuers.

data.recommend: Laning Phase: Use your first skill frequently to engage enemies, leveraging the range of your umbrella to suppress enemy movement.

spell.spell_desc:
Passive - Fairy Umbrella Dance
Gives a shield and slows enemies when picking up an umbrella. This is Wu Zetian's core self-protection skill.

Skill 1 - Fairy Umbrella
Throws an umbrella at the target area, dealing damage and slowing enemies on impact. This is Wu Zetian's primary means of both damage and crowd control.

Skill 2 - Soul Control

If the umbrella is nearby: Wu Zetian moves and leaves the umbrella behind.

If the umbrella is not nearby: Wu Zetian teleports to the umbrella's location and knocks back enemies.
High mobility and crowd control make this a core skill.

Skill 3 (Ultimate) - Shine of Stars
Deals multiple rounds of damage and knocks back enemies within range. Combined with the umbrella, it can create an AOE effect in team fights.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zetian works well with Tigreal, whose CC sets up her stun and burst.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Laning Strategy:
Start in the mid lane. Focus on clearing minions quickly and poking enemies with your skills. Avoid overextending—Zetian is squishy early.

Rotation:
After clearing the wave, roam to help side lanes. Use your crowd control and burn to assist in ganks or defend your allies.

Team Fight Strategy:
Stay at the backline. Use your skills to slow, poke, and deal consistent burn damage. Focus on protecting your damage dealers and disabling enemies.

Positioning:
Always position near your tank or behind the frontline. Avoid diving in. Use bush vision and map awareness to avoid getting picked off.

Objective Strategy:
During turtle or lord fights, stay near the back, spam skills, and apply pressure with poke. Use Wishing Lantern to boost ally shields or sustain in fights.
dominants.dominant_title: Early Game: Poke enemies with skills from a distance. Stay behind your tank and clear waves safely.  Mid Game: Help your team in small skirmishes. Use your slows and burn effects to harass and zone en

emblems.emblem_desc: To amplify her damage output and maximize the effects of her abilities.

equips.equip_desc:
This build focuses on magic damage, burn effects, and cooldown reduction.

Magic Boots: Gives cooldown reduction.

Enchanted Talisman: Mana sustain and 20% cooldown reduction.

Glowing Wand: Burns enemies over time, great for poke.

Wishing Lantern: Boosts utility and healing/shielding.

Holy Crystal: Increases magic burst damage.

Blood Wings: High magic power and bonus shield for survivability.

hero.hero_overview: A versatile mid-lane mage who excels at poking enemies from a safe distance and finishing off low-health targets. With her crowd control and magic burst, she can control team fights and zone opponents effectively.
hero.hero_strength: Strong poke and burst damage make her a threat throughout the match. Her crowd control can turn the tide of battles, especially when paired with initiation from allies. Play patiently—avoid overextending and wait for the right moment to engage for maximum impact.
hero.hero_weakness: Vulnerable to high-mobility assassins and burst heroes who can dive past her defenses. Many heroes can counter her if she's caught out of position, so proper positioning and map awareness are crucial.

data.recommend: "Zetian is a skilled ML player with great mechanics, game sense, and teamwork. A great guide to follow for improving gameplay and climbing ranks!"

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker is great for repositioning or escaping danger.
Zetian has no natural mobility, so Flicker helps avoid assassins or re-engage safely. Use it to blink over walls, dodge ultimates, or surprise enemies with better positioning during team fights.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: This duo will destroy enemy position by revealing their locations allowing your team to adjust and counter gank

counters.counter_desc: Wu Zetian counters Estes because grouping around will only increase your chances to get hit by her ult
Well this Fish can easily destroy this Empress. She's immune to cc while swimming countering Wu Zetian passive knockback

This cat can also defeat this empress. High mobility heroes greatly counter Wu Zetian because her main skill is a one directional skill and also this cat has immunity to cc allowing ger to bypass the knockback of Wu Zetian passive
This butterfly will just make the empress fly. Wu Zetian has no mobility unless you have flicker but if it's under CD you're pretty much dead

dominants.dominant_desc:
Your Clear Speed is extremely fast
Use your 2nd skill and first and your done

After that you can help your jungler or side lanes if you can
This stage will allow you to become a valuable asset in objective fights because of your ult reveal and stun. Note that your ult ult has a long cd at early game

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set gives you a 10%CD reduction at the start of the game and also still give her strong magic power scalling thanks to weapon master talent from the marksman emblem.
This build gives you a huge boost in magic power at the start of the game allows you to clear and poke your enemy with ridiculous high dmg even without items

equips.equip_desc:
The Enchanted Talisman and Fleeting Time will give you 35%CD Reduction plus your emblem 10% that will total to 45%CD Reduction with just 2 core items. Also Fleeting Time will reduce your ult cd by 30% for every assist or kill

This build will center around your ult which can reveal and stun enemies. Also your ult give your allies movement speed

The 3 wands will be your debuff items: Ice Queen wand will slow Glowing Wand for anti-heal and Genius Wand for Magic Defense reduction

You can enchant your boots dire hit because dire hit allows you to mark enemy when you apply cc to them and when ally hit them until the mark last it will deal additional dmg. Note that only your ult hit can only apply this mark

At Late Game you'll rain down phoenix

Blood wings will improve your survivability buy give you a shield that scales off your magic power. Genius Wand will pair well with your 2nd skill that reduces enemy magic defense. The sky piercer can be changed depending if you can stack it well. Wishing Lantern for high hp heroes and holy crystal to improve overall magic power

This build path is not easy to play because your must be aware of your blind spots because you have nothing to use except flicker. Note that this build will promote ridiculous high amount of magic power at the cost of higher CD of skills. Lastly you may want to recall every now and then because your mana reserve will deplete specially MLBB players don't know how to stop spamming skills

You can also enchant your boots into encourage to buff atk/magic power and atk speed of yourself and allies around you

Play safe you'll drop a nuke at enemy

hero.hero_overview: Wu Zetian is a unique mage, She can be your typical mage or your teams secondary support
hero.hero_strength:
First you must determine if you want to become a secondary support or a burst mage because her build and emblem talents are different depending on your role
The Secondary Support build is a 45%CD reduction along with items that can inflict debuffs on the enemy team like anti heal and slow
The Burst Mage build is pure magic power build this path is hard to play because her ulti has long cooldown but it's powerful if you can play her well

In Early Game you must only focus on clearing your wave and helping your jungler skirmish in the river (if you can).

Wu Zetian is not that powerful at ganking because she has no hard cc in her first 3 levels only unlocking a stun at lvl4 her ult that has long cooldown.

If your path is secondary support there is no need to save her ult just use it everytime you see your jungler ganking on sidelanes but if you do the burst build save if for objective teamfights like taking the turtle or lord.

data.recommend: Getting to know better the great Phoenix Empress Wu Zetian

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is her best spell because she has no mobility. This will allow her to escape dangerous enemy immediately.

data.title: Wu Zetian Mid Lane

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Zetian is very good if he contributes with Fredrin because Fredrin's strong defense is very suitable when holding back enemy damage that can immediately kill thin heroes.

counters.counter_desc: When Franco uses skill 1 or ulti on Zetian, all of that is nothing because Zetian has a passive that can make heroes who are near him immediately get a short stun effect and will cancel Franco's skill which will make it useless.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, play safe and objectively. When you enter the late game, try to keep your distance from heroes who like to lock 1 hero, such as Kalea, Franco, and Hilda.
dominants.dominant_title: At the beginning, try to play objectively and also rotate to the exp lane or gold lane so that the other lanes can be balanced in team fights later.
